title: IsInteractive helper
definition_of_done: IsInteractive() returns false when format=json or not a TTY; SetFormat wired in root PersistentPreRunE; TestIsInteractive* passes
outcome: Added SetFormat/IsInteractive to internal/tui/tty.go; wired SetFormat in root PersistentPreRunE; TestIsInteractive* passes

notes.msg: Implemented IsInteractive helper: added SetFormat(f string) and IsInteractive() bool to internal/tui/tty.go; wired SetFormat into root PersistentPreRunE in cmd/trellis/main.go; added TestIsInteractive* tests covering json/agent/no-TTY cases. All tests pass, build clean.
